cleanup_policy: dry-run only; no file deletion in overnight loop
expected_improvement: Improve answer score on dry-run API rows where the selected endpoint/params are real evidence but live payload is unavailable; no SQL/API/tool changes expected.
goal: Trial and, only if gated validation passes, promote a generic answer-only dry-run endpoint wording improvement.
rollback_condition: Revert behavior-changing edits if strict score does not improve, correctness regresses, hidden-style/readiness/secret scan fails, or SQL/API/tool hashes drift for answer-only rows.
